---
title: ""
format: html
---
## Syllabus
```{=html}
<title>Schedule</title>
<style type="text/css">

code.r{
  font-size: 30px;
}
</style>

<a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Schedule/NRS 520 Syllabus.pdf">Syllabus (PDF)</a></p>
```

### Readings

Come prepared to discuss the assigned reading. What was interesting and useful? What did not make sense to you? What did you disagree with? What did you learn? <span style="color:red">Bring points to highlight and bring questions (make a list)</span>.


## Schedule {.smaller}

| Week       | Topic                                          |
|------------|------------------------------------------------|
|~~1 (Sep)~~ |~~Class Org., Data vs. Information, R/Markdown~~| 
|~~2 (Sep)~~ | ~~R coding and Markdown~~                      | 
| 3 (Sep)    | Power Analysis, Study Design                   |
| 4 (Oct)    | Probability and Statistics                     |
| 5 (Oct)    | GLM modeling in R                              |
| 6 (Oct)    | Oct. 10 No Class / Holiday                     |
| 7 (Oct)    | Generalized Linear Models                      |
| 8 (Oct)    | Bayesian Models                                |
| 9 (Nov)    | Mixed Models / Hierarchical Models     |
| 10 (Nov)    | Regularization, Prediction, Cross-val.|
| 11 (Nov)    | Decision Making under uncertainty     |
| 12-14 (Nov-Dec) | Student lecture/lab               |

: {tbl-colwidths="\[30,70\]"}
